name: kwilt
description: Connect Codex to Kwilt context through MCP.

interface.shortDescription: Use your Kwilt context from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Connect Codex to Kwilt through MCP so the agent can read your Arcs, Goals, recent Activities, Chapter context, and show-up status when you ask for Kwilt-aware help.
